name: Eternal Echo
description: Notes Eternal Echo’s actual sword is comparable to the Ancient Stone Sword, with an identical rate of fire and range, but lower base damage (although Eternal Echo does pierce).
effects: Shots hit multiple targets Eternal Strength: Attack with Echo Beams Echo Beam: Deals 600-800 damage in a 2.25 square radius, scaling with your Attack and Status Effects Beam Range: Instantly strikes 4 tiles away in the direction of your attack Beam Effect: Ignores defense of target Beam Cooldown: 1 second
